calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Compel Dean Ito Taylor (I) To Turn Over All Trust Property And (Ii) Account
TENTATIVE RULING: Hearing. Appearance required, although no new papers have been filed. Counsel have not stipulated to a continuance by contacting the assigned examiner.
Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk.
Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME.
Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall.
Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances.
For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879.
For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

Petition For Order To Compel Dean Ito Taylor (I) To Turn Over All Trust Property And (Ii) Account
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Continued To Jun-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Meet And Confer
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryosuke Togi for petitioner Yoshihiro Tanaka (via Zoom).
Dean Ito Taylor, former successor trustee in pro per (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on: 1) Petition for Order to Compel Dean Ito Taylor to Turn Over All Trust Property and to Account; and 2) Status of Meet & Confer.

The matter was called for hearing on: 1) Petition for Order to Compel Dean Ito Taylor to Turn Over All Trust Property and to Account; and 2) Status of Meet & Confer.

The Court stated it had reviewed the file and noted the issues remained unresolved from prior hearings despite meet and confer efforts. Mr. Togi reported that he had received some information through discovery but had only recently learned of the existence of a will through interrogatory responses and had not received a copy. He stated that resolution may be possible upon receipt of the will and clarification regarding trust-related accounts.

Mr. Ito Taylor stated that all relevant documents, including the will and trust materials, had previously been provided, including in October 2025, and agreed to provide them again.

The Court directed Mr. Togi to identify the primary outstanding items needed to proceed, which he identified as the will and information regarding trust-related accounts. Mr. Ito Taylor agreed to provide that information.

The Court expressed concern that the matter had not progressed and indicated its intent to set the matter for trial if not resolved. The parties estimated trial would take approximately three to four hours. The matter was continued to June 8, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If not resolved, the Court will set a trial date and related deadlines.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Meet And Confer
Off Calendar Dec-01-2025 Continued To Apr-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ryosuke Togi appeared via zoom for Yoshiro Tanaka (petitioner).
Dean Ito Taylor appeared via zoom in pro per.

From the outset of the hearing Mr. Togi stated that he got no response to meet and confer on the matter, that they still need to figure out what tasks remain outstanding, that there is an IRA account from Wells Fargo that's not accounted for in the trust, that Mr. Taylor's address is linked to the account, and that he has not received the keys to the house or to the vehicles.

Mr. Taylor stated that he has provided formal accounting and bank statements, and that the beneficiary of the accounts is deceased, and that he resigned as successor trustee.

Both matters are continued to April 8, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ryosuke Togi appeared via zoom for Yoshiro Tanaka (petitioner).
Dean Ito Taylor appeared via zoom in pro per.

Discussion was held regarding mediation, that parties need to meet and confer again, and that they will make another attempt to meet.

The Court order partes to meet and confer. If the matter has not settled, the Court shall order this matter for trial.

The matter is continued to December 1, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Status on meet and confer is set for December 1, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Josh Fredricks. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Espin. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
Ryosuke Togi, Esq., for Yoshihiro Tanaka, Petitioner.
Sheila Robello, Esq., for Dean Ito Taylor, Respondent.

At the onset, counsel for Petitioner offers a brief update on the matter and reports that his client is requesting to take the instant petition off calendar. No objection to the preceding is presented.

The subject matter is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Continued To Feb-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ryosuke Togi appeared in person for Yoshihiro Tanaka (Petitioner).
Vincet Yu appeared via zoom for Dean Taylor (respondent).

Mr. Togi stated that trustee submitted a formal accounting one year ago and no distribution has been made, and that his client is in Japan and would like to pay the outstanding tax balance. Mr. Yu stated that funds are ready for disbursement, but it is waiting for the name change to take place. Amended petition to remove trustee etc., is continued to February 05, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by January 22, 2024.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Continued To Nov-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Collins, Esq. specially appearing in person for Ryosuke Togi, Esq. counsel for Yoshihiro Tanaka, Petitioner;
Sheila Robello, Esq. via Zoom for Dean Ito Taylor, Respondent/Trustee.

Mr. Collins confirmed for the Court that he was not with Mr. Togi's office and that he was making a special appearance today.

The Court addressed the petition stating that there needs to be a formal accounting for the period 8/12/21 through 8/31/23. Ms. Robello stated that the petition asks for removal of her client as well as an accounting and that the parties have been meeting and conferring. The Court addressed the defective notice as to Mr. Taylor. Ms. Robello waived notice on behalf of her client and stated that they have all of the petitions.

The Court continued the petition to November 22, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A formal accounting is to be filed by November 8, 2023. The parties are to continue to meet and confer.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.
